title: Month closing (Attendance)
subtitle: Close and reopen attendance month by company

emptyState.title: No company selected
emptyState.description: Select a company from the filters above to view and manage month closing.

closeModal.title: Confirm month closing
closeModal.description: Once closed, no further attendance modifications will be allowed for this period. Do you want to continue?

errors.title: Error
errors.incompleteRecords: Cannot close: {count} incomplete record(s) in the period

precloseModal.title: Preclose month
precloseModal.description: When preclosing, consolidated stats will be calculated and no attendance edits will be allowed until all approvers confirm with their PIN.

confirmPinModal.title: Confirm with my PIN
confirmPinModal.description: Enter your closing PIN to confirm the closing of {month} {year}.

confirmPinModalError: Invalid or unset PIN. Configure your closing PIN if you have not yet.

closingPinConfig.description: The PIN is used to confirm month closing as an approver. Use 4 to 8 digits.
closingPinConfig.otpChangeExplanation: To change your PIN, verify the current one and choose a new one with 4-8 digits. Choose a PIN that is easy to remember but hard to guess.
closingPinConfig.otpSetExplanation: Create your 4-8 digit PIN. It is important for your account security. Remember, do not share it with anyone.
closingPinConfig.currentRequired: You must enter your current PIN to change it
